current_status: source-local registry module; disabled with collect-when-disabled off
source_discovery_method: source-local host guard for calopps.org and the official job-search-list endpoint
list_fetch_method: source-local GET list fetch with bounded next-page links
detail_fetch_method: not enabled for this checkpoint; use list title, agency path, region/location, category, job type, and close date fields
pagination_method: follow source <li class="next"> page controls up to a safe maxPages limit; do not brute-force ids
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: url-or-title-inference: preserve /job-{id} URL ids as source_job_id.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: preserve the region/location cell and normalize country/region/city conservatively.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: normalize only when the region/location text proves a concrete place.
remote_type_rule: source-absent unless exact remote/telework text appears; geo-backed list rows normalize as onsite through the generic gate.
posting_date_rule: source-absent in saved fixtures: preserve close_date separately and leave posting_date null unless a future source fixture proves a true posted/open date.
rate_limit: strict public-board rate limit with long cooldown after 429/403

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: source remains disabled/collect-when-disabled off; public writes require live canary proof that geo-backed rows stay clean and close dates are not treated as posting dates

quarantine_reason: disabled hold: source-local parser/fetch fixtures exist, but live canary/source quality evidence has not been approved or applied

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: keep disabled until a bounded live canary proves source quality and net-new clean public candidates
certification_blockers: live canary/source quality evidence pending; no production source apply has been run
